mapper.select:
SELECT l.product_id AS productId, l.product_code AS productCode, l.product_name AS productName, l.product_spec AS productSpec, MAX(COALESCE(i.batch_no, '')) AS batchNo, l.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, MIN(l.biz_date) AS earliestBizDate, MIN(l.expiry_date) AS nearestExpiryDate, SUM(l.in_pieces) AS totalInPieces, SUM(l.out_pieces) AS totalOutPieces, SUM(l.in_pieces - l.out_pieces) AS stockPieces, SUM(l.in_quantity) AS totalInQuantity, SUM(l.out_quantity) AS totalOutQuantity, SUM(l.in_quantity - l.out_quantity) AS stockQuantity, MAX(l.unit_price) AS lastUnitPrice, MAX(COALESCE(p.safe_stock_boxes, 0)) AS safeStockBoxes, MAX(COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0)) AS freshnessWarningDays, CASE WHEN SUM(l.in_pieces - l.out_pieces) <= MAX(COALESCE(p.safe_stock_boxes, 0)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS safetyWarning, CASE WHEN MIN(l.expiry_date) IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(MIN(l.expiry_date), CURDATE()) <= MAX(COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS freshnessWarning FROM erp_stock_ledger l LEFT JOIN erp_product p ON p.id = l.product_id LEFT JOIN erp_trade_order_item i ON i.id = l.order_item_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND l.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%')
AND l.warehouse_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warehouseName}, '%')
GROUP BY l.product_id, l.product_code, l.product_name, l.product_spec, l.warehouse_name ORDER BY safetyWarning DESC, freshnessWarning DESC, l.product_name ASC, l.warehouse_name ASC

SELECT MIN(io.id) AS inboundOrderId, MIN(i.id) AS inboundItemId, MIN(io.presale_order_id) AS presaleOrderId, i.product_id AS productId, i.product_code AS productCode, i.product_name AS productName, i.product_name_en AS productNameEn, MAX(i.product_spec) AS productSpec, MAX(i.unit) AS unit, SUM(COALESCE(i.expected_qty, 0)) AS expectedBoxes, SUM(COALESCE(i.packing_boxes, 0)) AS packingBoxes, SUM(COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0)) AS inboundBoxes, SUM(COALESCE(alloc.allocated_boxes, 0)) AS allocatedBoxes, SUM(COALESCE(outbound.outbound_boxes, 0)) AS outboundBoxes, SUM(COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(alloc.allocated_boxes, 0)) AS availableBoxes, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0) * COALESCE(i.spec_weight, 0)), 2) AS inboundWeightKg, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(alloc.allocated_weight, 0)), 2) AS allocatedWeightKg, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(i.damage_weight_kg, 0)), 2) AS damageWeightKg, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0) * COALESCE(i.spec_weight, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(alloc.allocated_weight, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(i.damage_weight_kg, 0)), 2) AS availableWeightKg, MAX(COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0)) AS freshnessWarningDays, MAX(CASE WHEN i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0) > 0 AND DATEDIFF(i.expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS freshnessWarning FROM erp_inbound_order_item i INNER JOIN erp_inbound_order io ON io.id = i.inbound_order_id LEFT JOIN erp_product p ON p.id = i.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT source_inbound_item_id, SUM(COALESCE(boxes, 0)) AS allocated_boxes, SUM(COALESCE(contract_quantity_kg, 0)) AS allocated_weight FROM erp_sale_order_item WHERE sale_type = 'SPOT' AND source_inbound_item_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY source_inbound_item_id ) alloc ON alloc.source_inbound_item_id = i.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT soi.source_inbound_item_id, SUM(COALESCE(soi.boxes, 0)) AS outbound_boxes FROM erp_sale_order_item soi INNER JOIN erp_sale_order so ON so.id = soi.sale_order_id WHERE soi.sale_type = 'SPOT' AND soi.source_inbound_item_id IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(so.outbound_receipt_confirmed, 0) = 1 GROUP BY soi.source_inbound_item_id ) outbound ON outbound.source_inbound_item_id = i.id WHERE i.product_id IS NOT NULL
AND ( i.product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.product_name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND io.warehouse_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warehouseName}, '%')
AND io.container_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{containerNo}, '%')
GROUP BY i.product_id, i.product_code, i.product_name, i.product_name_en
HAVING SUM(COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(alloc.allocated_boxes, 0)) > 0
ORDER BY freshnessWarning DESC, i.product_code ASC, i.product_name ASC

SELECT io.id AS inboundOrderId, i.id AS inboundItemId, io.presale_order_id AS presaleOrderId, io.contract_no AS contractNo, io.customer_name AS customerName, io.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, io.container_no AS containerNo, i.product_id AS productId, i.product_code AS productCode, i.product_name AS productName, i.product_name_en AS productNameEn, i.sku_code AS skuCode, i.temperature_zone AS temperatureZone, i.production_date AS productionDate, i.expiry_date AS expiryDate, COALESCE(i.packing_boxes, 0) AS packingBoxes, COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0) AS inboundBoxes, COALESCE(alloc.allocated_boxes, 0) AS allocatedBoxes, COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0) - COALESCE(alloc.allocated_boxes, 0) AS availableBoxes, ROUND(COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0) * COALESCE(i.spec_weight, 0), 2) AS inboundWeightKg, ROUND(COALESCE(alloc.allocated_weight, 0), 2) AS allocatedWeightKg, ROUND(COALESCE(i.damage_weight_kg, 0), 2) AS damageWeightKg, ROUND(COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0) * COALESCE(i.spec_weight, 0) - COALESCE(alloc.allocated_weight, 0) - COALESCE(i.damage_weight_kg, 0), 2) AS availableWeightKg, COALESCE(i.shelf_life_days, 0) AS shelfLifeDays, COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0) AS freshnessWarningDays, CASE WHEN i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0) > 0 AND DATEDIFF(i.expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS freshnessWarning FROM erp_inbound_order_item i INNER JOIN erp_inbound_order io ON io.id = i.inbound_order_id LEFT JOIN erp_product p ON p.id = i.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT source_inbound_item_id, SUM(COALESCE(boxes, 0)) AS allocated_boxes, SUM(COALESCE(contract_quantity_kg, 0)) AS allocated_weight FROM erp_sale_order_item WHERE sale_type = 'SPOT' AND source_inbound_item_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY source_inbound_item_id ) alloc ON alloc.source_inbound_item_id = i.id WHERE i.product_id = #{productId}
AND io.warehouse_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warehouseName}, '%')
AND io.container_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{containerNo}, '%')
AND COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0) - COALESCE(alloc.allocated_boxes, 0) > 0
ORDER BY io.warehouse_name ASC, io.container_no ASC, io.contract_no ASC, i.expiry_date ASC, i.production_date ASC, i.id ASC

SELECT MIN(po.id) AS presaleOrderId, MIN(pp.id) AS packingId, MIN(pi.id) AS packingItemId, pi.product_id AS productId, pi.product_code AS productCode, pi.product_name AS productName, pi.product_name_en AS productNameEn, SUM(COALESCE(pi.total_boxes, 0)) AS futuresBoxes, SUM(COALESCE(sold.sold_boxes, 0)) AS futuresSoldBoxes, GREATEST(SUM(COALESCE(pi.total_boxes, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(sold.sold_boxes, 0)), 0) AS futuresAvailableBoxes, SUM(COALESCE(pi.total_weight, 0)) AS totalWeightKg, SUM(COALESCE(sold.sold_weight, 0)) AS soldWeightKg, GREATEST(SUM(COALESCE(pi.total_weight, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(sold.sold_weight, 0)), 0) AS availableWeightKg, MAX(COALESCE(pi.shelf_life_days, pp.shelf_life_days)) AS shelfLifeDays, MAX(COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0)) AS freshnessWarningDays, MAX(CASE WHEN batch.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0) > 0 AND DATEDIFF(batch.expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS freshnessWarning FROM erp_presale_packing_item pi INNER JOIN erp_presale_packing pp ON pp.id = pi.packing_id INNER JOIN erp_presale_order po ON po.id = pp.presale_order_id LEFT JOIN erp_presale_confirm pc ON pc.presale_order_id = po.id LEFT JOIN erp_product p ON p.id = pi.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT packing_item_id, MIN(production_date) AS production_date, MIN(expiry_date) AS expiry_date FROM erp_presale_packing_batch GROUP BY packing_item_id ) batch ON batch.packing_item_id = pi.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT source_presale_order_id, product_id, SUM(COALESCE(boxes, 0)) AS sold_boxes, SUM(COALESCE(contract_quantity_kg, 0)) AS sold_weight FROM erp_sale_order_item WHERE sale_type = 'FUTURES' AND source_presale_order_id IS NOT NULL AND product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY source_presale_order_id, product_id ) sold ON sold.source_presale_order_id = po.id AND sold.product_id = pi.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT io.presale_order_id, i.product_id, SUM(COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0)) AS transferred_boxes FROM erp_inbound_order_item i INNER JOIN erp_inbound_order io ON io.id = i.inbound_order_id WHERE i.product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY io.presale_order_id, i.product_id ) inbound ON inbound.presale_order_id = po.id AND inbound.product_id = pi.product_id WHERE pi.product_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT ( COALESCE(inbound.transferred_boxes, 0) >= COALESCE(pi.total_boxes, 0) AND COALESCE(pi.total_boxes, 0) > 0 )
AND ( pi.product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pi.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pi.product_name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND COALESCE(pp.contract_no, pc.contract_no, po.seller_contract_no, po.order_no) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractNo}, '%')
AND COALESCE(pp.container_no, pc.container_no) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{containerNo}, '%')
GROUP BY pi.product_id, pi.product_code, pi.product_name, pi.product_name_en
HAVING GREATEST(SUM(COALESCE(pi.total_boxes, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(sold.sold_boxes, 0)), 0) > 0
ORDER BY freshnessWarning DESC, pi.product_code ASC, pi.product_name ASC

SELECT b.id AS batchId, pi.id AS packingItemId, po.id AS presaleOrderId, COALESCE(po.seller_contract_no, po.order_no) AS presaleOrderNo, COALESCE(pp.contract_no, pc.contract_no, po.seller_contract_no, po.order_no) AS contractNo, po.customer_reference AS customerReference, po.brand_name AS brandName, COALESCE(pp.container_no, pc.container_no) AS containerNo, COALESCE(pc.expected_arrival_date, po.expected_date) AS expectedArrivalDate, pi.product_id AS productId, pi.product_code AS productCode, pi.product_name AS productName, pi.product_name_en AS productNameEn, b.production_date AS productionDate, b.expiry_date AS expiryDate, COALESCE(b.box_count, 0) AS boxes, COALESCE(b.weight, 0) AS weightKg, COALESCE(b.box_count, 0) AS futuresBoxes, COALESCE(sold.sold_boxes, 0) AS futuresSoldBoxes, GREATEST(COALESCE(pi.total_boxes, 0) - COALESCE(sold.sold_boxes, 0), 0) AS futuresAvailableBoxes, COALESCE(b.weight, 0) AS totalWeightKg, COALESCE(sold.sold_weight, 0) AS soldWeightKg, GREATEST(COALESCE(pi.total_weight, 0) - COALESCE(sold.sold_weight, 0), 0) AS availableWeightKg, COALESCE(pi.shelf_life_days, pp.shelf_life_days) AS shelfLifeDays, COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0) AS freshnessWarningDays, CASE WHEN b.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0) > 0 AND DATEDIFF(b.expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= COALESCE(p.freshness_warning_days, 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS freshnessWarning FROM erp_presale_packing_item pi INNER JOIN erp_presale_packing pp ON pp.id = pi.packing_id INNER JOIN erp_presale_order po ON po.id = pp.presale_order_id LEFT JOIN erp_presale_confirm pc ON pc.presale_order_id = po.id INNER JOIN erp_presale_packing_batch b ON b.packing_item_id = pi.id LEFT JOIN erp_product p ON p.id = pi.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT source_presale_order_id, product_id, SUM(COALESCE(boxes, 0)) AS sold_boxes, SUM(COALESCE(contract_quantity_kg, 0)) AS sold_weight FROM erp_sale_order_item WHERE sale_type = 'FUTURES' AND source_presale_order_id IS NOT NULL AND product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY source_presale_order_id, product_id ) sold ON sold.source_presale_order_id = po.id AND sold.product_id = pi.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT io.presale_order_id, i.product_id, SUM(COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0)) AS transferred_boxes FROM erp_inbound_order_item i INNER JOIN erp_inbound_order io ON io.id = i.inbound_order_id WHERE i.product_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY io.presale_order_id, i.product_id ) inbound ON inbound.presale_order_id = po.id AND inbound.product_id = pi.product_id WHERE pi.product_id = #{productId} AND NOT ( COALESCE(inbound.transferred_boxes, 0) >= COALESCE(pi.total_boxes, 0) AND COALESCE(pi.total_boxes, 0) > 0 )
AND COALESCE(pp.contract_no, pc.contract_no, po.seller_contract_no, po.order_no) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractNo}, '%')
AND COALESCE(pp.container_no, pc.container_no) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{containerNo}, '%')
AND GREATEST(COALESCE(pi.total_boxes, 0) - COALESCE(sold.sold_boxes, 0), 0) > 0
ORDER BY b.production_date ASC, b.expiry_date ASC, b.line_no ASC, b.id ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'INBOUND' AS recordType, '入库' AS recordTypeName, COALESCE(io.order_date, io.create_time) AS bizDate, io.wms_order_no AS orderNo, io.contract_no AS contractNo, io.customer_name AS customerName, io.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, io.container_no AS containerNo, i.product_id AS productId, i.product_code AS productCode, i.product_name AS productName, i.product_name_en AS productNameEn, i.product_spec AS productSpec, i.unit AS unit, COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0) AS boxes, ROUND(COALESCE(i.actual_qty, 0) * COALESCE(i.spec_weight, 0), 2) AS weightKg, '入库单' AS sourceRemark FROM erp_inbound_order_item i INNER JOIN erp_inbound_order io ON io.id = i.inbound_order_id WHERE i.product_id IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'OUTBOUND' AS recordType, '出库' AS recordTypeName, COALESCE(r.update_time, so.update_time, so.create_time) AS bizDate, so.order_no AS orderNo, so.contract_no AS contractNo, so.secondary_partner_name AS customerName, soi.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, soi.source_container_no AS containerNo, soi.product_id AS productId, soi.product_code AS productCode, soi.product_name AS productName, soi.product_name_en AS productNameEn, soi.product_spec AS productSpec, soi.unit AS unit, COALESCE(soi.boxes, 0) AS boxes, COALESCE(soi.contract_quantity_kg, ROUND(COALESCE(soi.boxes, 0) * COALESCE(soi.spec_weight, 0), 2)) AS weightKg, '销售出库' AS sourceRemark FROM erp_sale_order_item soi INNER JOIN erp_sale_order so ON so.id = soi.sale_order_id LEFT JOIN erp_sale_outbound_receipt r ON r.sale_order_id = so.id WHERE soi.product_id IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(so.outbound_receipt_confirmed, 0) = 1 ) t WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( t.productCode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.productName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.productNameEn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.orderNo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.customerName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND t.recordType = #{recordType}
AND t.contractNo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractNo}, '%')
AND t.warehouseName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warehouseName}, '%')
AND t.containerNo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{containerNo}, '%')
ORDER BY t.bizDate DESC, t.recordType ASC, t.orderNo DESC, t.productCode ASC
